description_long: This is a classic rectangular briefcase made from brown, textured leather with a slightly weathered appearance. The front features a large flap secured by a central leather strap and a metal buckle, with two external pockets beneath the flap for additional storage. The top of the briefcase has a sturdy, rounded leather handle attached with metal hardware, allowing for easy carrying. The back is plain, showing the natural grain and patina of the leather, while the sides reveal the briefcase's slim profile and the thickness of the material. The overall construction suggests durability and a traditional, professional style suitable for urban environments. The briefcase likely opens via the front flap, providing access to an interior compartment for documents or personal items.
description: A brown, weathered leather briefcase with a central buckle, two front pockets, and a sturdy top handle. Its classic, professional design features a textured surface and a slim profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main flap, central buckle, and two external pockets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and thickness of the leather, with the handle visible on top.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain, unadorned leather surface with visible grain and patina.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the attachment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Single rounded leather handle, fixed, attached with metal hardware to the top of the briefcase.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Central metal buckle with a leather strap closure on the front flap.
attribute_external_pockets: Two external pockets on the front, beneath the main flap, each with its own flap closure.
